reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Buena atención pero hoy necesitaba más personal, muchas demora para cargar NAFTA.

(Translated by Google)
Good service but today they needed more staff, there were long delays to fill up with gasoline.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURkdTZhRWlBRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Very friendly and helpful staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkaDhfNVhBEAE

reviews.comment:
Nos salvaron jajaja, se nos había quemado una luz baja y no encontramos por ninguna parte, pero acá si tenían y nos la pudieron reparar, muchas gracias!!! El minimercado tiene todo lo que podes querer, lo único malo es que no se puede pagar con la app YPF.

(Translated by Google)
They saved us, haha. Our low beam was out and we couldn't find it anywhere, but here they did have it and were able to fix it. Thank you so much! The convenience store has everything you could want. The only downside is that you can't pay with the YPF app.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkMjdYZFVREAE

reviews.comment:
CUIDADO, SI ABONAN CON TARJETA, BAJENSE, POR QUE A MI ME CLONARON MI TARJETA DE DEBITO, Y ME VACIARON LA CUENTA!!!

(Translated by Google)
WARNING: IF YOU PAY BY CARD, GET OFF THE CARD, BECAUSE MY DEBIT CARD WAS CLONED AND MY ACCOUNT WAS EMPTYED!!!

reviews.comment:
Todo maravilloso, pero sobre todo la atención de Matías, uno de los chicos que trabaja en la playa! Excepcional trato y predisposición!

(Translated by Google)
Everything was wonderful, but especially the service from Matías, one of the guys who works on the beach! Exceptional service and willingness!
